name: White Pizza- Authentic Italian
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in the warm water.
2. Add the yeast/water mixture to 3 cups of the flour.
3. Mix, gradually adding regular salt and olive oil.
4. Gradually add the remaining flour until the dough feels right.
5. Turn dough onto a floured board and knead; add more flour if needed to prevent sticking.
6. Place dough in a greased bowl and rotate to coat with grease.
7. Let rise until doubled in size (about 2 hours).
8. Remove dough, punch down, and roll out on a floured board to a thickness of 3/8 to 1/2 inch. Shape as desired.
9. Place dough in a pan or cookie sheet.
10. Brush with additional olive oil using a pastry brush.
11. Make dimples over the surface with your thumb and two fingers.
12. Sprinkle Kosher sea salt and dried rosemary evenly over the dough.
13. Let rise for a short time more.
14. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 25 minutes.
15. Brush with olive oil again before serving.
Makes 1 white pizza.
